hero.subtitle: Virtual Employability & Document Analyzer (VEDA) deeply evaluates your career profile using knowledge-driven insights. Drop your resume to uncover skill gaps, industry fit, and actionable improvements.

dropzone.title: Drop your resume PDF here, or click to browse
dropzone.subtitle: PDF only · max 10 MB · text is never stored

errors.invalid_pdf: Please upload a valid PDF file.
errors.no_text: Could not extract text. Make sure the PDF is not an image/scan.
errors.read_failed: Failed to read PDF. Please try pasting text instead.
errors.upload_first: Please upload a PDF resume first.
errors.too_short: Text is too short. Please provide at least 100 characters.
